metaDescription: Max Chen - Robotics Engineering Technology student at Purdue University. Experienced in robotics, embedded systems, and research.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Passion for Innovation & Excellence
about.para1: Results driven Robotics Engineer with proven expertise spanning AI, embedded systems, and hardware design.
about.para2: Specialized in computer vision, machine learning, and full-stack robotics development from PCB design to edge AI deployment. Unique background combining cutting-edge robotics research with audio engineering demonstrating versatility across interdisciplinary domains.
about.degree: Bachelor of Science in Robotics Engineering Technology

overview.title: Experience & Projects
overview.subtitle: Highlights of My Work
overview.cardExperienceDesc: Currently serving as an Audio Engineering Research Assistant at Purdue SEAT Lab. Recent experience includes Military Service with the Republic of China Air Force, Engineering Intern at Purdue Applied Research Institute, and Robotics Research Assistant at HIRoLab where I contributed to educational robotics and prosthetics research.
overview.cardProjectsDesc: Led development of AI-powered PPE detection system, manufactured 100+ educational robotics kits, and created custom hardware/software for research applications.

contact.title: Connect & Resources
contact.subtitle: Let's Connect & Collaborate

contact.cvDescription: Comprehensive academic and research background with publications

experience.earlierToggleSmall: High School Achievements, International Education, Early Robotics
experience.jobMilitarySubtitle: Republic of China Air Force -- Taiwan (ROC)
experience.jobMilitaryDesc: Completed compulsory military service, demonstrating discipline, responsibility, and effective teamwork.
experience.jobMilitaryR1: Operated and maintained advanced technical systems in high pressure environments
experience.jobMilitaryR2: Adhered to strict operational protocols and safety standards to ensure reliable daily operations
experience.jobAudioSubtitle: Sensor, Electro-Acoustics Technology Laboratory (SEAT Lab), Purdue University
experience.jobAudioDesc: Conducting advanced audio research focusing on the relationship between acoustical loads and electrical impedance.
experience.jobAudioR1: Research Innovation: Conducting advanced audio research focusing on the relationship between acoustical loads and electrical impedance
experience.jobAudioR2: Automation Development: Designed and implemented custom Python applications for semi-automated data collection, improving measurement process efficiency
experience.jobAudioR3: Technical Expertise: Use advanced instrumentation tools for precise data acquisition, signal processing, and frequency response analysis
experience.jobAudioR4: Web Development: Designed and deployed a website for the research laboratory
experience.jobTeachingSubtitle: ECET 327 - Instrumentation and Data Acquisition Design
experience.jobTeachingDesc: Instructing and mentoring students in course laboratory activities based on LabVIEW programming.
experience.jobTeachingR1: Laboratory Instruction: Facilitated hands-on laboratory sessions for students in the course, ECET 327 (Instrumentation and Data Acquisition Design)
experience.jobTeachingR2: Teaching Support: Taught and provided support in NI LabVIEW programming
experience.jobTeachingR3: Student Mentorship: Provided detailed feedback on lab reports and assignments, ensuring mastery of course exercises
experience.jobTeachingR4: Technical Support: Troubleshot complex hardware and software issues
experience.jobInternSubtitle: Purdue Applied Research Institute - Microelectronics Lab
experience.jobInternDesc: Conducted advanced semiconductor research and developed custom instrumentation systems.
experience.jobInternR1: Semiconductor Research: Performed cutting-edge research on silicon wafer manufacturing processes and direct bonding techniques
experience.jobInternR2: System Integration: Assembled and optimized a precision wafer probe station from diverse components
experience.jobInternR3: Custom Hardware Development: Designed and fabricated controller hardware/software to integrate linear positioning systems
experience.jobInternR4: Innovation: Created control schemes utilizing hand gestures with computer vision technology
experience.jobCreatorDesc: Creating online assessments on the Variate and Brightspace platforms for Purdue courses.
experience.jobCreatorR1: Content Development: Developed and verified assignments for Purdue ECET and Physics courses using LaTeX, ensuring accuracy and consistency on the Variate and D2L Brightspace platforms
experience.jobCreatorR2: Assessment Verification: Verified assessments for Purdue Math classes on the D2L Brightspace online learning system
experience.jobRoboticsSubtitle: Human Interactive Robotics Laboratory (HIRoLab) - Purdue University
experience.jobRoboticsDesc: Research in educational robotics, prosthetics, and human-robot interaction with focus on K-12 STEM education.
experience.jobRoboticsR1: Communication Systems: Developed I2C communication protocols between single-board computers and microcontrollers using Robot Operating System (ROS)
experience.jobRoboticsR2: Educational Innovation: Designed, fabricated, and delivered 100+ STEM-education robotic kits using advanced digital fabrication
experience.jobRoboticsR3: Biomedical Engineering: Assisted in testing Electromyography (EMG) muscle sensor systems for safe human-robot interaction in educational settings
experience.jobRoboticsR4: Curriculum Development: Created comprehensive standards-based lesson plans and a 2-week robotics curriculum for K-12 students
experience.jobRoboticsR5: Prosthetics Research: Designed and manufactured lower leg prosthesis adapters for biomechanics research with healthy subjects
experience.jobRoverSubtitle: Human Exploration Rover Club - Purdue University
experience.jobRoverDesc: Progressed from contributing member to team lead for NASA Human Exploration Rover Challenge competition.
experience.jobRoverR1: Leadership Progression: Led rapid prototyping of compliant end-effectors to accelerate sample collection process for the NASA Human Exploration Rover Challenge competition
experience.jobRoverR2: Engineering Design: Designed mounting hardware under geometrical and weight constraints of the mobile rover
experience.jobRoverR3: Team Development: Contributed to team development and mentored junior members in instrumentation design and rapid prototyping techniques
experience.jobRobomastersDesc: Developed electrical systems for competitive robotics team.
experience.jobRobomastersR1: PCB Design: Designed and manufactured custom PCBs for control of semi-autonomous mobile robots
experience.jobRobomastersR2: CAD Tools: Applied EasyEDA and KiCAD for circuit design and circuit board layout
experience.jobSpaceDayDesc: Multi-year volunteer for campus-wide K-12 STEM outreach event, progressing to leadership role.
experience.jobSpaceDayR1: Leadership Development: Led and managed a group of elementary students during the 2023 event, ensuring safe navigation and engagement in hands-on STEM demonstrations
experience.jobSpaceDayR2: Operations Support: Coordinated operations support and managed attendee check-in during the 2022 event
experience.jobSpaceDayR3: STEM Outreach: Demonstrated commitment to STEM education outreach through multi-year volunteer service
experience.jobHighSchoolDesc: International bilingual education with focus on STEM and robotics programs.

experience.jobVexR2: Team Contribution: Created a communication channel with the school to further develop the robotics program
experience.jobVexR3: Technical Expertise: Developed robotics design, programming, and competition strategy

projects.ppeDesc: Built an AI-powered PPE vending system that detects missing gear in real time and automatically dispenses required equipment to improve workplace safety.
projects.ppeFeature1: Real-time You Only Look Once (YOLO) Detection
projects.ppeModalOverview: Senior capstone project delivering a computer-vision PPE compliance workflow: detect missing gear in real time, then trigger automated dispensing for immediate safety intervention.
projects.ppeScope: YOLO model training, edge deployment, hardware integration, GUI development
projects.ppeOutcome: Built an end-to-end PPE compliance system that detects missing gear and triggers automated dispensing
projects.ppeKf1: Intelligent vending machine system utilizing AI camera technology to detect PPE compliance
projects.ppeKf2: Automatically dispenses missing Personal Protective Equipment to workers
projects.ppeKf3: Real-time PPE detection using YOLO object detection algorithm with custom trained model
projects.ppeKf4: User-friendly GUI built with PySide6 and Nvidia Jetson Orin Nano for edge AI processing
projects.ppeTechStack: Python, PySide6, OpenCV, YOLO, Nvidia Jetson Orin Nano. Full project sits:
projects.eduModalOverview: This research initiative at HIRoLab brings hands-on robotics to K–12 education through custom hardware, curriculum development, and scalable kit manufacturing.
projects.eduRoboticsDesc: Educational robotics program designed to engage K-12 students in STEM learning through hands-on robotics experiences. Includes custom hardware design, manufacturing, and comprehensive curriculum development.
projects.eduImpact1: Designed and fabricated over 100 STEM-education robotic kits for K-12 students
projects.eduImpact2: Developed comprehensive standards-based curriculum for 2-week robotics programs
projects.eduTech1: Created custom Printed Circuit Board (PCB) design for educational microcontroller boards
projects.eduTech2: Implemented EMG circuit to control robot arm based on Microchip platform
projects.eduTech3: Tools Used: ROS, Arduino, Laser Cutting, PCB Design, Curriculum Development
projects.rallyCarDesc: Developed a ROS-based autonomous rally stack with LIDAR wall/lane following and waypoint navigation, achieving a 48-second lap and 3rd place in KNOY 500.
projects.rallyModalOverview: Built and tuned an autonomous navigation pipeline for MFET 442, combining wall following and map-based waypoint control with AMCL/Hector SLAM for competition reliability.
projects.rallyScope: LIDAR-based wall/lane following, waypoint navigation, AMCL/SLAM integration
projects.rallyOutcome: Placed 3rd in KNOY 500 with a 48-second lap using a robust ROS navigation stack
projects.rallyTechStack: ROS, SLAM, path planning, LIDAR, AMCL, PD control, sensor fusion. Repository:
projects.rallyKa1: Developed autonomous navigation system for rally car with a third place (48 seconds) finish in the KNOY 500 competition around the first floor of Knoy Hall (Polytechnic Institute Building)
projects.rallyKa2: Implemented wall and lane following algorithm using LIDAR distance measurements and Proportional-Derivative (PD) control
projects.rallyKa3: Developed waypoint navigation system with Adaptive Monte Carlo Localization (AMCL) and Hector mapping
projects.rallyKa4: Integrated Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) and LIDAR sensor readings for robust autonomous navigation
projects.videosPlayable: Watch the demos below or open on YouTube.
projects.rdWaferModalOverview: At Purdue Applied Research Institute's microelectronics lab, I integrated and optimized a prototype wafer probe station, then implemented automation and measurement workflows for repeatable semiconductor testing.
projects.rdWaferDesc: Integrated and optimized a silicon wafer probe station prototype, adding custom controls and automated measurement workflows for semiconductor testing.
projects.waferRole: Engineering intern for system integration and automation
projects.waferScope: Probe station assembly, linear rail control design, GUI-assisted automated measurements
projects.waferOutcome: Delivered a working wafer test setup with improved repeatability and faster measurement workflows
projects.rdWafer1: Integrated diverse components into cohesive testing system
projects.rdWafer2: Designed custom controller for linear positioning rails
projects.rdWafer3: Implemented automated measurement protocols with custom GUI
projects.rdAudioModalOverview: At SEAT Lab I improved and automated earphone impedance measurement workflows using Python and DIGILENT instrumentation, supporting reproducible research data collection.
projects.audioScope: Python tooling, DIGILENT integration, standardized test workflow design
projects.audioOutcome: Improved repeatability and reduced manual effort in impedance data collection
projects.rdAudioDesc: Improved and automated data collection system for earphone impedance measurements using Python scripting and creating procedures.
projects.rdAudio1: Developed Python automation scripts and application for data collection
projects.rdProstheticsModalOverview: At HIRoLab I contributed to biomechanics research by designing and fabricating lower-leg prosthesis adapters for healthy-subject studies, supporting development of below-ankle prosthetic devices.
projects.prostheticsScope: CAD design, rapid prototyping, adapter build iterations, test support
projects.prostheticsOutcome: Delivered adapter prototypes that supported biomechanics testing workflows
projects.rdProstheticsDesc: Design and fabrication of lower leg prosthesis adapter for biomechanics research with healthy subjects, contributing to advancement in below ankle prosthetic device development and testing.
projects.rdProsthetics1: Rapid prototyping of various prosthetic adapter designs
projects.rdProsthetics2: CAD design of prosthetic adapter components
projects.rdProsthetics3: Testing protocol development for human subjects

projects.galleryEarDesc: Earphone impedance measurement setup using Python automation and DIGILENT instrumentation.
